title.en: Stake eGold using Hatom Liquid Stake
title.de: eGold mit Hatom Liquid Stake staken
title.es: Stake eGold using Hatom Liquid Stake
title.fr: Stake eGold using Hatom Liquid Stake
title.ro: Stake eGold using Hatom Liquid Stake
title.it: Stake eGold using Hatom Liquid Stake

description.en: Liquid-stake your EGLD through Hatom Protocol on MultiversX and receive sEGLD in return. Earn staking rewards while keeping your assets liquid for use across DeFi lending, borrowing, and yield farming.
description.de: Liquid-stake dein EGLD ueber das Hatom-Protokoll auf MultiversX und erhalte sEGLD zurueck. Verdiene Staking-Belohnungen und behalte gleichzeitig die Liquiditaet deiner Assets fuer DeFi-Lending, Borrowing und Yield Farming.
description.es: Liquid-stake your EGLD through Hatom Protocol on MultiversX and receive sEGLD in return. Earn staking rewards while keeping your assets liquid for use across DeFi lending, borrowing, and yield farming.
description.fr: Liquid-stake your EGLD through Hatom Protocol on MultiversX and receive sEGLD in return. Earn staking rewards while keeping your assets liquid for use across DeFi lending, borrowing, and yield farming.
description.ro: Liquid-stake your EGLD through Hatom Protocol on MultiversX and receive sEGLD in return. Earn staking rewards while keeping your assets liquid for use across DeFi lending, borrowing, and yield farming.
